title: UserPreferencesUpdatedEvent
description: Published by User Service after a user successfully submits or updates their music preferences (onboarding or settings update). Consumed by Recommendation Service to seed/reset genre weights in Redis.

event_id.description: Unique event identifier (UUID v4). Used as idempotency key. Redis key: rec:idempotency:{event_id}, TTL 24h.

version.description: Schema version. Always 'v1' for this schema.

timestamp.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp of when the preference update was committed (e.g. 2026-04-15T09:00:30.123Z).

correlation_id.description: Distributed tracing ID propagated from the originating HTTP request.

user_id.description: Anonymized user identifier (UUID v4). MUST NOT contain PII.

preferred_genres.description: List of preferred genres selected by the user. Minimum 3 required (onboarding constraint). Each genre becomes a key in rec:weights:{user_id} with initial weight 1.0.

genre_id.description: UUID of the genre. Used as hash field in rec:weights:{user_id}.

genre_name.description: Human-readable genre name (e.g. 'Indie Pop'). Stored for display purposes in rec:onboarding:{user_id}.

preferred_artist_ids.description: List of artist UUIDs the user explicitly follows/prefers. Stored in rec:onboarding:{user_id} for initial recommendation seeding.

is_onboarding.description: True if this is the user's first-time preference submission (onboarding flow). False for subsequent preference updates. Recommendation Service uses this to decide whether to reset or merge weights.

idempotency_key.description: The Idempotency-Key header value from the original HTTP POST /api/v1/users/me/preferences request. Prevents duplicate processing if the HTTP request was retried.
